title: rubus × heleocharis
intro: Rubus × heleocharis, a hybrid species of bramble, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the yellow raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of anthocyanins and ellagic acid, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus × heleocharis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer properties. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture, and its berries can also be consumed fresh or frozen for their nutritional value.
